description: A long-form article with byline, blockquotes, inline code, pre/code blocks, an SVG figure, and mixed serif/sans typography
visual_assertions: The article title should be large (32px) sans-serif at the top
The byline should appear in smaller gray sans-serif text below the title
Blockquotes should have a blue left border and light background with italic text
The 'cite' text below each blockquote should appear in small gray non-italic text
Inline code snippets (e.g., '150-300MB') should appear in a monospace font with a light background and red text
The pre/code block showing the architecture diagram should appear in a dark background with light text
The SVG bar chart figure should appear with colored rectangles representing Chromium, Native, and WASM render times
The figure caption should appear in small italic gray text below the chart
Body text should use a serif font (Georgia or Times) for readability
The highlighted span ('high-performance native renderers') should have a yellow background
